div.class: position-absolute d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle fw-bolder z-2
div.style: width: 2rem; height: 2rem; top: 0; left: 0; transform: translate(-30%, -30%); background: #28a745; color: white; font-size: 0.85rem;

div.class: position-absolute start-0 w-100 text-center fw-bold z-2
div.t-att-style: 'background: rgba(40, 167, 69, 0.85); color: white; font-size: 0.7rem; padding: 2px 0;' + (counterPay > 0 ? 'bottom: 1.2rem; border-radius: 3px;' : 'bottom: 0; border-radius: 0 0 3px 3px;')

div.class: position-absolute d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle fw-bolder z-2
div.style: width: 2rem; height: 2rem; top: 0; left: 0; transform: translate(-30%, -30%); background: #f39c12; color: white; font-size: 0.85rem;

div.class: position-absolute bottom-0 start-0 w-100 text-center fw-bold z-2
div.style: background: rgba(243, 156, 18, 0.85); color: white; font-size: 0.7rem; padding: 2px 0; border-radius: 0 0 3px 3px;

div.class: position-absolute d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle fw-bolder z-2
div.style: width: 2rem; height: 2rem; top: 0; left: 0; transform: translate(-30%, -30%); background: #e67e22; color: white; font-size: 0.85rem;

div.class: position-absolute bottom-0 start-0 w-100 text-center fw-bold z-2
div.style: background: rgba(230, 126, 34, 0.85); color: white; font-size: 0.7rem; padding: 2px 0; border-radius: 0 0 3px 3px;
